profile.profile_id_and_body_entity_id: non-empty canonical IDs <=128 UTF-8 bytes; whitespace, controls, U+FEFF, and /*$#? are forbidden

command_channels.order: unique names in ascending UTF-8 lexical order
command_channels.bounds: finite binary64 min and max with min <= max
command_channels.name_grammar: non-empty canonical ID <=128 UTF-8 bytes; whitespace, controls, U+FEFF, and /*$#? are forbidden
command_channels.text_limits: unit is non-empty control-free UTF-8 <=64 bytes; actuator_semantics is non-empty control-free UTF-8 <=512 bytes

safe_actions.neutral_or_shutdown: hold_max_ms is null and channel_values defines every command channel exactly at matching arity with finite in-range values
safe_actions.hold_last: channel_values is empty and hold_max_ms is an integer in 1..1000
safe_actions.body_local_executor: non-empty canonical ID <=128 UTF-8 bytes; whitespace, controls, U+FEFF, and /*$#? are forbidden

profile.unknown_members: reject at every profile object boundary

digest.projection: the complete validated profile object excluding only the root profile_digest_sha256 member
digest.unknown_members: none are permitted, so no unbound extension state exists
digest.verify: profile_digest_sha256 must be 64 lowercase hex and exactly equal the computed digest

boundary: content addressing and deterministic validation do not certify physical safety; the body remains final actuator authority
